templates.template: {PLAYER} must ask for permission from the 'Bartender' (host) before taking any drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks without permission, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot rest their glass on the table; they must always keep it in their hand.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can let go of the glass now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} rests the glass, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must wink at someone before each drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't wink, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say the word 'drinking' or its variants.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says the forbidden word, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must clean their area of the table with an imaginary napkin every turn.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets to clean, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot look anyone in the eyes while speaking.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} makes eye contact, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must refer to the game owner as 'Boss'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the rank, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use their phone for anything.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} looks at their phone, drink {DRINKS} punishment sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must high-five someone before each challenge.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot laugh out loud (silent laughter only).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} makes a sound, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say 'That's a good one!' after every drink.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to comment on the drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot cross their legs while sitting.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} crosses their legs, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must act as if they are drunk (slurred speech) when it's their turn to speak.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks normally, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot touch their face with their hands.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} touches their face, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must imitate a waiter serving drinks every time someone drinks.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't act, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot sit all the way back; they must lean on the edge of the chair.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} sits comfortably, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must yell 'Give me another one!' to the air after every challenge.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use words with more than 3 syllables.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses a long word, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must always drink with their eyes closed.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} opens their eyes, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot mention names of alcoholic drinks.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} mentions a drink, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must rattle the ice in their glass (if they have any) before speaking.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to make noise.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the noise, drink {DRINKS} sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot touch any other player.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} touches someone, drink {DRINKS} sips for contact.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must ask 'What did you say to me?' every time someone speaks to them.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't ask, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink unless 2 other players are drinking at the same time (they must accompany them).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks alone, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must strike the table before and after each drink.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to strike the table.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the strike, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.
